title: qa-playtest-analyst report
description: EXPERIENCE findings, not defects. Playtests measure fun; bug bashes measure correctness — this schema is the former. Defects discovered incidentally go in incidental_defects for routing into defect-inventory, never mixed into findings.

protocol.description: what was played and how (map, duration, automation-driven or scripted walkthrough)

finding.description: the experience observation (pacing, clarity, friction, feel)

evidence.description: what was observed that supports this — moment, log, metric

incidental_defects.description: bugs noticed while playing — routed to defect triage, not judged here

verdict.description: the one-word answer to 'is it fun yet'
